'''Deke Holman''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Socorran]] who served as a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Harrier Infiltration Team]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was also a crew member on the ''[[Prodigal]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
